subject: Mor'du from Disney/Pixar's Brave in his human prince form — a large imposing figure with massive dark hair and white painted markings, dual-wielding axes
description: A large, powerfully built human figure strides forward across an open highland or otherworldly landscape. The figure has an enormous mane of dark hair and white or light-colored paint markings on his arms and chest, giving a ritualistic or war-painted appearance. In each hand the figure holds a weapon — one appears to be a broad axe and the other a smaller weapon or hatchet, both clearly visible. The figure's expression is haughty and disdainful. The background is a dramatic open expanse of rolling terrain under a bright teal-blue sky, with dark alien-looking plant shapes at the edges suggesting the Wilds Unknown setting.
foreground: Large figure with dark mane hair and white paint markings, dual axes in hand
background: Open highland or otherworldly terrain under teal sky with dark alien vegetation
